name: Create Order
description: Creates a new payment order. The order must be created before collecting payment from the customer.
details: Once created, use the order_id to initiate a payment session. Orders expire after 30 minutes if not completed.

bodyParams.name: order_amount
bodyParams.description: Transaction amount in smallest currency unit (paise).

bodyParams.name: customer_id
bodyParams.description: Existing customer ID from Create Customer API.

bodyParams.name: order_note
bodyParams.description: Short note or description for the order.

responses.description: Bad request – invalid or missing parameters.
